roles.content: Existentialism - Kierkegaard: A comprehensive examination of existentialism - kierkegaard within History of Philosophy, exploring foundational concepts, key arguments, and contemporary interpretations.
Critical perspectives on existentialism - kierkegaard: Examining objections, alternative frameworks, and limitations of dominant approaches to existentialism - kierkegaard.
Recent developments in existentialism - kierkegaard: Current research trends, emerging debates, and new applications of existentialism - kierkegaard in contemporary philosophy.
roles.source: British Journal for the History of Philosophy
